name: com.cupkekgames.combat
description: Turn-based combat framework: CombatUnit (Health/Mana/Buffs/Shield/AI), CombatActionSO + action node behaviour-trees (Damage/Heal/Shield/StatusEffect/Projectile/Indicator), CombatAttributeRegistrySO + AttributeSet, target selection, status effects, projectiles, threat table, ICombatRules + ICombatSettings extension hooks.
